[Double Account EXP Campaign Preview]

The Double Account EXP event will start on 2/9 (Fri)!
Don't miss this chance to boost your account level!

🗓️Period: 2/9 (Fri) 7:00 PM – 2/11 (Sun) 6:59 PM (UTC)
